name: PR list Findings column + PR detail seeded review run, verdict, and findings
description: On the PR list, confirm the new FINDINGS column header renders (the per-severity counters live in each row). Then from PR #482, open the Agent runs tab and confirm the seeded review run renders (verdict 'request changes', 2 findings) in its accordion header. The newest run's accordion is open by default (FindingsTab passes defaultOpen to the first run), so the VerdictBanner and the seeded FindingCard ('Hardcoded Stripe secret key in commit') are revealed without an extra click. Exercises the new FindingsCounts counters plus the ReviewRunAccordion / VerdictBanner / FindingsPanel / FindingCard. Read-only seeded data (no model call). Assumes a freshly-seeded DB where acme/payments-api (PR #482) is the first repo — guaranteed by e2e-web.yml; run locally via the hermetic stack (see e2e/README.md). The counters are icon+number, so the numeric values are asserted in the server integration + client component tests, not here.

steps.label: PR list shows the new Findings column header

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: open the PR row
navigate to the PR detail route
switch to the Agent runs tab
findings tab is active in the URL
the seeded timeline run shows its token + cost line
seeded run accordion shows its verdict
accordion header shows the seeded finding count

cmd: Hardcoded Stripe secret key in commit
steps.label: seeded FindingCard is visible (newest run is open by default)
